decision_title: Auth module shipped with no P0 bugs
evidence_quotes: Alex opened by confirming the auth module shipped last Friday with zero P0 bugs.

decision_title: JWT token expiry set to 24 hours
evidence_quotes: Ben said the JWT token expiry is set to 24 hours as agreed in Sprint 2.

decision_title: Password reset emails not being rate-limited
evidence_quotes: Carol flagged that password reset emails are not being rate-limited.
Max 3 reset attempts per hour was agreed in the security review on 2026-06-28.

decision_title: API Gateway technology and rate limit
evidence_quotes: The API gateway will use AWS API Gateway with a 100 req/min limit per user. This was Ben's recommendation based on load tests.

decision_title: Mobile app team blocked by Auth API spec
evidence_quotes: Alex noted the mobile app team is blocked until the auth API spec is published.

decision_title: Auth API spec publish target date
Automated integration tests for auth endpoints
evidence_quotes: Carol wants all three auth endpoints (login, refresh, reset) to have automated integration tests before Sprint 3 sign-off.
What is the fallback behaviour if the API gateway goes down?

decision_title: Refresh token invalidation on password reset
evidence_quotes: Are refresh tokens invalidated on password reset?
